caption:
I am not mind, intellect, ego, or memory; not ear or tongue, not nose or eyes; not space, earth, fire, or wind — I am the form of consciousness-bliss: I am Shiva, I am Shiva.

— Nirvana Shatakam 1 (Adi Shankaracharya)

#bhagavadgita #sanskrit #vedanta #hinduism #spirituality #sanatandharma #yoga #bhakti #upanishads #vedas #ashtavakra #shiva #krishna #wisdom #dailyverse
